title: Employment Code (Minimum Wages and Conditions of Employment) (General) Order, 2023

sections.heading: (1) This Order may be cited as the Employment Code Title and
sections.text: (Minimum Wages and Conditions of Employment) (General) Order, commencement

sections.heading: (2) This Order shall come into operation on 1 st January, 2024.
(1) This Order shall apply to an employee. Application
